title: Grab Bags
description: Grab Bags adds craftable Loot Bags to Survival Minecraft. Find them by killing mobs or creating and upgrading your own!
body: "Grab Bags" is a 1.20.1 Survival-Friendly Loot Bag mod for all of your gambling needs. Featuring 5 material (Loot:) tiers and 5 container (Chance:) tiers for a total of 25 unique loot bags, most can be crafted or found by killing hostile mobs. A unique "Chance:" mechanic means you won't always win big, but allows for a balanced implementation of crafting recipies for the aformention bags. Grab Bags means the chance for fun loot!
